title: Great Learning is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Great Learning is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Great Learning, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Great Learning:
Great Learning is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Great Learning!
